description: Phishing templates impersonating Microsoft products and services

templates.name: Microsoft Account Suspicious Sign-In
suggested_subject_lines: Action required: Review recent sign-in from Bogotá, Colombia
Security alert: Unrecognized device accessed your Microsoft account
templates.notes: Use {{.Date}} for current date realism. The specific location (Bogotá) adds believability. Works across all Microsoft 365 users.

templates.name: SharePoint – Document Shared
suggested_subject_lines: A document has been shared with you
{{.FirstName}}, a file was shared with you on SharePoint
"Q3 Budget" has been shared with you
templates.notes: Shared-document lure is among the highest-clicking Microsoft scenarios. Universal across Microsoft 365 orgs.

templates.name: Microsoft 365 – Password Expiration
suggested_subject_lines: Action required: your password is about to expire
Keep your Microsoft 365 password to avoid sign-out
templates.notes: Password-expiry for the Microsoft category. Pairs with the suspicious-sign-in template for a multi-touch sequence.

templates.name: Microsoft Teams Direct Message Alert
suggested_subject_lines: Microsoft Teams: Missed chat or workspace invitation
You have a pending notification in Teams from Project Manager
[Teams] Project Manager sent you a direct message
templates.notes: Impersonates a missed call or message in Microsoft Teams to drive clicks.

templates.name: Microsoft OneDrive File Share Notification
suggested_subject_lines: OneDrive: Admin Portal shared Q3_Budget_and_Compensation_Reviews.xlsx with you
Document Shared: Q3 Budget and Compensation Reviews
Microsoft OneDrive: Access shared excel file
templates.notes: Exploits greed and curiosity by pretending to share a sensitive salary and budget Excel sheet.

templates.name: Microsoft 365 MFA Re-enrollment Notification
suggested_subject_lines: Action Required: Set up Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for Microsoft 365
Microsoft 365 Security: MFA registration and device update pending
Urgent Notice: Re-enroll in Multi-Factor Authentication
templates.notes: Simulates organization policy updates requiring users to update or re-enroll their authentication settings.
